prompt: Describe a thunderstorm. No sentence may contain more than 5 words. Keep every sentence to 5 words or fewer.
response: Dark clouds gather above. The sky turns gray. Wind begins to howl. Trees sway and bend. Lightning cracks the sky. Thunder shakes the ground. Rain pours down hard. Puddles form on streets. Flashes illuminate the darkness. The air smells electric. Hail pelts the rooftops. Windows rattle and shake. Children hide under blankets. Dogs whimper with fear. The storm rages on. Thunder rumbles once more. Rain slows to drizzle. Clouds begin to part. Sunlight peeks through again. The storm finally passes.
